description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a flat, extended roof covering both the main living area and a carport. The front entrance is accentuated by a paved walkway and a small garden with climbing plants. The backyard is enclosed by a white fence and includes several mature trees, a hammock, and a small shed or outbuilding. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior rooms. The carport is attached to the side of the house and contains a parked vehicle, while the rear garden area is landscaped with both grass and decorative plants. The overall design is modern and functional, with a focus on open outdoor spaces and practical living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, attached carport, and a landscaped backyard enclosed by a white fence. Features include large windows, a paved entrance, and mature trees in the garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, carport, and a glimpse into the interior rooms and backyard trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, driveway, and the arrangement of windows and garden beds along the side of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, mature trees, hammock, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, side windows, and the transition between the house and the carport area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
